subcodes.title: Words to Ethel Rosenberg et al, spoken in Oct. 1904
subcodes.first_line: The healing that is by the power of the Holy Spirit needs no special concentration or contact. It is through the wish or desire and the prayer of the holy person.
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @power of prayer, @station of the Manifestation of God, @The Holy Spirit
